businessContext_i18n.fr: Hypothèse de taux de croissance perpétuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Supuesto de tasa de crecimiento perpetuo.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.tv_bd: fcf5 * (1 + terminalBuyume / 100) / Math.max(0.0001, (WACC / 100 - terminalBuyume / 100)) / Math.pow(1 + WACC / 100, 5)
formulas.sonuc: fcf1 / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 1) + fcf2 / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 2) + fcf3 / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 3) + fcf4 / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 4) + fcf5 / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 5) + (fcf5 * (1 + terminalBuyume/100) / Math.max(0.0001, (WACC/100 - terminalBuyume/100))) / Math.pow(1 + WACC/100, 5)

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate enterprise value using discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis.
description.long: Calculate enterprise value using discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis.

short_i18n.en: Calculate enterprise value using discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis.
short_i18n.tr: Şirketin nakit üretme kapasitesine dayalı işletme değerini (DCF) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Unternehmenswert mittels Discounted-Cashflow-Analyse (DCF).
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la valeur d'entreprise à l'aide de l'analyse des flux de trésorerie actualisés (DCF).
short_i18n.es: Calcular el valor empresarial mediante el análisis de flujo de caja descontado (DCF).
short_i18n.ar: احسب قيمة المؤسسة باستخدام تحليل التدفقات النقدية المخصومة (DCF).
